---
title: "Event Results"
subtitle: "Browse recent Silver Spurs barrel racing results"
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: _footer.html
    self-contained: false
---

<div id="results-app">

<div class="results-controls">
  <label>Search:
    <input type="search" id="results-search" placeholder="Search rider, horse, event, division" />
  </label>
  <label>Event:
    <select id="results-event-filter">
      <option value="">All events</option>
    </select>
  </label>
  <label>Class:
    <select id="results-class-filter">
      <option value="">All classes</option>
    </select>
  </label>
</div>

<div id="results-summary">Loading results…</div>
<div id="results-table"></div>

</div>

<script id="results-data" type="application/json">
{{< include data/results.json >}}
</script>
<script src="scripts/results.js?v=20260604"></script>

<style>
.results-controls {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.results-controls label {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  align-items: center;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.results-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.results-table th,
.results-table td {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  text-align: left;
}
.results-table th {
  background: #691C32;
  color: white;
}
.results-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f7f7f7;
}
</style>
